tQTLExperiment 0.1.14
  • Get started
  • Reference

Add gene symbols to rowRanges

Source: R/addGeneSymbols.R
addGeneSymbols.Rd

Looks up HGNC gene symbols for Ensembl gene IDs in rownames(x) using an ensembldb::EnsDb annotation object and adds them as a gene_name column in mcols(rowRanges(x)). Version suffixes (e.g. .3 in ENSG00000100181.3) are stripped before lookup.

Usage

addGeneSymbols(x, ensdb = NULL)

Arguments

x

A tQTLExperiment (or any SummarizedExperiment::RangedSummarizedExperiment with Ensembl IDs as rownames).

ensdb

An ensembldb::EnsDb object. Defaults to EnsDb.Hsapiens.v79::EnsDb.Hsapiens.v79 if that package is installed.

Value

x with an additional gene_name metadata column in rowRanges(x).

Examples

exdir <- system.file("extdata", package = "tQTLExperiment")
tqe <- tQTLExperiment(
    plinkPrefix = file.path(exdir, "chr22-n100"),
    phenoFile   = file.path(exdir, "mean-pheno-n100.bed"),
    genome      = "hg38"
)
#> Extracting number of samples and rownames from chr22-n100.fam...
#> Extracting number of variants and colnames from chr22-n100.bim...
if (requireNamespace("EnsDb.Hsapiens.v79", quietly = TRUE))
    tqe <- addGeneSymbols(tqe)
